title: Easy Guns
description: A small mod containing some guns and ammo, along with a villager profession.
body:
![Easy Guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b52e23a960f8952b5643758b86a72601c9609b8f.png)

Please note: This mod is best used with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) as the recipes may be janky.

The content of this mod ranges from a stick filled with gunpowder to Flamethrowers and Nukes.

It's yet another Gun Mod, though with some potentially stronger guns than most mods give you, for a pretty cheap price.

_Mod made by: [Lawreel](https://modrinth.com/user/Lawreel),
Artwork by: [Bananapantz](https://modrinth.com/user/Bananapantz)_
